purpose: Baseline + scope-boundary contract for the /auto-optimize loop on the GA chatbot corpus. Consumed by .claude/skills/auto-optimize/SKILL.md per docs/plans/2026-05-14-arch-cherny-adoption-and-tribunal-ci-plan-v2.md §Phase 2 item 4.
metric_description: Fraction of non-skipped prompts in Tests/Apps/GaChatbot.Api.Tests/Corpus/prompts.yaml that satisfy ALL their declared invariants (contains, not_contains, routes_to, must_not_fallback, forbidden_agent_ids, min_routing_confidence, _signature.json shape). Computed by Scripts/run-prompt-corpus.ps1 -Snapshot.
primary_baseline_source: post-#224 local snapshot 2026-05-16: 47/50 active prompts passed (94%). The remaining 3 are LLM-bound wording-variance cases on local Ollama. Re-baseline after demos host is redeployed past #221/#224/#225/#227 and cascade is enabled (Mistral fallback should bump the pass rate further).

scope_boundary.allow_edit_rationale: Loop edits skill implementations, MCP wrappers, intent routing, orchestrator plugins, and domain services — the layers behind a chatbot answer. NEVER prompts, corpus, oracle scripts, runbooks, or CI workflows.
scope_boundary.protected_rationale: Oracle, baselines, gates, and signature fixtures are operator-owned. The loop must NOT alter the contract it's measured against. Override marker required in commit subject: [allow-protected: <path>] — but only the operator may add this.

constraints.plateau_threshold_note: Five consecutive cycles where the relative metric delta is <0.5% triggers a graceful exit. Plateau is signal that the loop's toolbox is exhausted for this corpus shape — not failure.

pre_merge: Demerzel tribunal verdict on PRs touching Common/GA.Business.ML/Agents/** or Mcp/** (per feedback_multi_llm_review_pays_off memory)
Backend Tests, Build Solution, claude-review CI checks all green
Branch protection requires protected-files-hook to confirm no diff outside allow_edit
human_only: Loop NEVER merges its own PRs in Phase 2.
Level 4 (auto-merge on multi-LLM green) requires Ollama-vs-cloud signal-measurement gate clearance per v2 plan §Phase 2 item 6.

dependencies.cascade_pr: #225 (CascadingChatClient + MistralChatClient) — once merged + enabled on demos, expect baseline to climb
dependencies.signature_pr: #227 (CanonicalSignatureChecker) — provides the trace-shape gate the loop relies on
